title: Clean Up Legacy and Development Files from Stage Directory
description: Clean up the staging directory by removing development, legacy, and backup files that are no longer used in production. Originally proposed creating an 'archive' folder at root or prefixing non-production files with `test_` or `_archive`. Developer opted to simply remove unused files since Git history preserves them for future retrieval.
acceptance_criteria: All unused development and legacy files are removed from the stage directory
No production-critical files are accidentally removed
Files are recoverable from Git history if needed
implementation_notes: Unused files were removed directly rather than archived, since Git history serves as the archive. This keeps the deployment directory clean.
comment_summary: Developer removed unused and backup files, noting that Git history makes a separate archive folder unnecessary.
